pattern_candidates.name: gitnexus:start MCP contract block
pattern_candidates.description: Structured Always/When/Never block in CLAUDE.md defining MCP tool usage rules with impact risk levels (d=1/d=2/d=3). Template for SoNash when it emits MCP tool contracts.

pattern_candidates.name: Signs pattern (recurring failures as codified rules)
pattern_candidates.description: GUARDRAILS.md introduces 'Signs' - recurring failure patterns codified once observed twice. Analogous to SoNash MEMORY.md feedback entries but repo-visible.

pattern_candidates.name: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json reference impl
pattern_candidates.description: Canonical format for Claude Code marketplace: marketplace.json + plugin.json (name, version, source, description). Wave 5 Rank 3 validation.

pattern_candidates.name: Typed DAG phase pipeline
pattern_candidates.description: 12-phase ingestion DAG with typed deps[], execute(ctx, deps), and output. Cycles validated at startup. Adding a phase is a new file + buildPhaseList() registration. Relevant to plan-orchestration Wave 2+ (SWS CANON).

pattern_candidates.name: PreToolUse ambient grep enrichment
pattern_candidates.description: Hook intercepts grep results and appends graph context (callers, callees, processes) silently. Makes meta-tooling ambient rather than explicit.

pattern_candidates.name: superpowers plan format (TDD-first executable spec)
pattern_candidates.description: Structured plan: write failing test - verify fail - implement - verify pass - commit template. Checkbox tracking per step, spec ref. Real-world example at docs/superpowers/plans/.

knowledge_candidates.name: SWE-bench 3-mode eval harness shape
knowledge_candidates.description: Baseline / native / native_augment modes, per-instance cached by (repo, commit), multi-model support. Structural pattern for measuring agent capability gain from meta-tooling.

knowledge_candidates.name: Multi-IDE MCP negotiation at install time
knowledge_candidates.description: One MCP server reaches 5 IDEs. Setup command auto-detects editor and writes config once. Claude Code gets PreToolUse+PostToolUse depth; others get base tools.

knowledge_candidates.name: Confidence-scored edges
knowledge_candidates.description: Every relation carries confidence 0.7-1.0 (exact/heuristic/fallback/lenient). Tools expose minConfidence filter. Lets agents decide when to clarify vs proceed.

knowledge_candidates.name: Precomputed relational intelligence
knowledge_candidates.description: Shift cognitive load from LLM to indexing pipeline: precompute clusters (Leiden), flows, confidence. Tools return complete context in one call. Indirect relevance to /recall improvements.

knowledge_candidates.name: SWE-bench eval server daemon
knowledge_candidates.description: HTTP daemon (localhost:5959) ~50x faster than cold CLI per tool call. Only relevant if SoNash measures skill invocation cost.

content_candidates.name: eval/README.md (SWE-bench harness ref)
content_candidates.description: 214-line reference. 3 modes, metrics, caching, multi-model support.

content_candidates.name: CLAUDE.md gitnexus:start contract block
content_candidates.description: The template block for MCP tool contracts in CLAUDE.md.

content_candidates.name: GUARDRAILS.md with Signs pattern
content_candidates.description: Non-negotiables + Signs (recurring failures codified as rules).

content_candidates.name: gitnexus-pr-review skill (graph-impact-based PR review)
content_candidates.description: PR review via graph impact d=1/2/3 classification. Complements SoNash /pr-review (bot feedback processing).

anti_pattern_candidates.name: MCP tool shadowing (naming conflicts with native tools)
anti_pattern_candidates.description: Defining MCP tools with names that conflict with native tools (e.g., custom `grep`). GitNexus noodlbox-comparison draft flags this as unsafe. Lesson: name SoNash MCP tools distinctly (sonash_search_patterns, not search).

anti_pattern_candidates.name: Aspirational docs outrunning implementation
anti_pattern_candidates.description: swift-ingestion-gaps.md, type-resolution-roadmap.md at root alongside shipped docs. GitNexus mitigates by using .sisyphus/drafts/ for clearly-marked drafts. Lesson: never let brainstorm/plan content leak into shipped docs.

anti_pattern_candidates.name: Over-featuring before measurement
anti_pattern_candidates.description: GitNexus has ~1 core capability + 1 eval harness. SoNash has 77 skills + 38 agents + 450 patterns + 0 eval harness. Inverse ratio. Lesson: add eval before skill N+1.

anti_pattern_candidates.name: Graph/schema versioning without migration path
anti_pattern_candidates.description: GitNexus graph schema has no documented migration path. Same risk applies to SoNash SQLite index at .research/content-analysis.db. Lesson: add MIGRATIONS.md when schema is next touched.

related_repos.reason: Potential overlap on eval harness patterns
Both emit Claude Code integration via MCP, different domain

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both care about measuring agent capability; GitNexus ships SWE-bench harness, autoresearch has research agent methodology
Both use MCP as the integration contract with agent environments
Explicit competitor per .sisyphus/drafts/noodlbox-comparison.md. Not yet analyzed. Session Hooks pattern identified as steal-worthy.
